={{ JSON.stringify({ profile_id: $json.profile_id, analysis_type: $json.analysis_type, engagement_summary: $json.engagement_summary, top_posts: $json.top_posts, worst_posts: $json.worst_posts, best_posting_times: $json.best_posting_times, content_type_breakdown: $json.content_type_breakdown, raw_response: $json.raw_response }) }}
